text:
Market today: Risk-off tone with Bitcoin sliding under $60K signaling broad crypto/speculative sentiment pressure. Tech and chip names face headwinds as macro uncertainty and job anxiety weigh on growth multiples - exactly the environment that punishes your concentrated, leveraged book.

Your holdings: PLTR down nearly 13% and flashing SELL - on margin, that hole gets deeper fast, your stop at $85 is well below current price but watch it. AVGO is your largest position, down 13.5% and flagged TRIM - size here is the real risk, a further leg down hits you hard with leverage. SNOW is your bright spot at +44% but marked TRIM - you have profit to protect, do not let a winner reverse on you. SPCX is a brand-new, very volatile IPO with limited price history - margin amplifies any sudden drop here, manage it tight.

Watch: Qualcomm's AI data center CPU announcement could shift sentiment across chip names including AVGO and SMH - monitor for follow-through. Cerebras margin confusion is rattling AI infrastructure confidence, watch if that bleeds into broader chip/AI names.

Bottom line: Protect AVGO size and lock in SNOW gains before margin turns your winners into lifelines.
